title: Indraprastha Apollo is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Indraprastha Apollo is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Indraprastha Apollo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Consultant Physician to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Indraprastha Apollo:
Indraprastha Apollo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indraprastha Apollo!
